summary: Comprehensive testing of refactored Matka 11 backend and frontend after modular refactoring. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All 8 admin tabs visible and functional. Frontend loads correctly with proper auth flow.

issues: Console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - minor React state update warning, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: GET /api/games returns 6+ games
GET /api/results returns results array
GET /api/settings returns valid settings object
GET /api/push/vapid-key returns VAPID public key
POST /api/auth/admin/login with admin@sattamatka.com / Admin@123 works
POST /api/auth/admin/login rejects invalid credentials (401)
GET /api/admin/stats returns stats object (requires admin auth)
GET /api/admin/games returns games list (requires admin auth)
GET /api/admin/withdrawals returns withdrawals array (requires admin auth)
GET /api/admin/deposits returns deposits array (requires admin auth)
GET /api/admin/users returns users array (requires admin auth)
GET /api/admin/settings returns settings (requires admin auth)
GET /api/admin/results/status returns today results status (requires admin auth)
GET /api/admin/bet-distribution returns distribution data (requires admin auth)
GET /api/admin/chat/users returns chat users (requires admin auth)
GET /api/games/{game_id} returns single game details
GET /api/results/{game_id} returns game-specific results
GET /api/admin/jantri returns jantri report
GET /api/admin/jantri/export returns export data
GET /api/help/messages returns help messages
Admin Panel frontend loads correctly with all 8 tabs visible
Tab: रिजल्ट घोषणा (Results) - clickable and shows content
Tab: बेट रिपोर्ट (Bets) - clickable and shows content
Tab: गेम सेटिंग्स (Games) - clickable and shows content
Tab: निकासी (Withdrawals) - clickable and shows content
Tab: जमा सूची (Deposits) - clickable and shows content
Tab: यूजर्स (Users) - clickable and shows content
Tab: सेटिंग्स (Settings) - clickable and shows content
Tab: Chat - clickable and shows user chats
Admin stats cards display numbers properly (27 users, 36 bets, ₹1200 deposits, ₹1050 withdrawals)
User signup page loads correctly with OTP flow
User login page loads correctly with phone input
Unauthenticated users redirected to /signup from /dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - all routes properly modularized into /routes/ directory
Frontend refactoring successful - AdminPage.js properly imports 8 tab components from /admin/
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for admin tabs
Cookie-based auth with withCredentials:true working correctly
API routes properly prefixed with /api through FastAPI router
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring verification complete. Backend split from monolithic server.py (3109 lines) into modular routes (auth_routes.py, admin_routes.py, game_routes.py, wallet_routes.py, result_routes.py, chat_routes.py, notification_routes.py). Frontend AdminPage.js split into 8 tab components. All endpoints working correctly. Admin auth uses cookies with httpOnly and secure flags.
